name: meshy_retexture
description: Retexture an existing 3D model using Meshy.ai. Applies new textures to existing geometry based on a text prompt or reference image. Works on models from previous Meshy tasks (text-to-3D, remesh) or external model URLs. Preserves original UVs by default. After calling, poll with meshy_check_task using source='retexture' until complete, then download with meshy_download_model. Costs 10 Meshy.ai credits.

input_task_id.description: ID of a completed Meshy task (text-to-3D preview/refine, remesh) to retexture. Provide this OR model_url, not both.

model_url.description: Public URL to a 3D model file (.glb, .gltf, .obj, .fbx, .stl) to retexture. Provide this OR input_task_id, not both.

text_style_prompt.description: Text description of desired texture style, up to 600 characters. e.g. 'weathered stone with moss growing in cracks'. Provide this OR image_style_url.

image_style_url.description: URL to a reference image (.jpg, .png) for texture style. Provide this OR text_style_prompt.

enable_pbr.description: Generate PBR texture maps (metallic, roughness, normal) in addition to base color. Default: true.
